raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A white bowl filled with oranges sits on a gray countertop. The bowl is a rigid container with a circular rim; the oranges are spherical and clustered within the bowl. STRATEGY - Reach the bowl, grasp an orange from its rim, lift it, and transport it to a new location on the countertop. Failure modes include misgrasping (too many oranges) or dropping. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the bowl rim for stable grasp; Step 2 grasp an orange from the rim; Step 3 lift the orange; Step 4 transport to a new location; Step 5 place the orange.**
Goal: any_in(orange, white_bowl); stable(orange)
Scene: white_bowl, orange, countertop
Step 1: reach(white_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the white bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(orange)
  affordance_region: the body of an orange
  contact: holding(orange) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(orange)
Step 3: transport(orange -> countertop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop
  spatial: above(orange, countertop, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(orange)
  done_when: above(orange, countertop, 0.05)
Step 4: place(orange -> countertop)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop
  contact: surface_contact(orange, countertop) [completion]; released(orange) [completion]
  pose: stable(orange) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(orange, countertop) AND released(orange)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the rim of the white bowl
an empty area on the countertop
an empty area on the countertop
